title: Pagination, Filtering, Links, Rate Limits, Versioning, and Resumable Work · Automation and Data Client Systems · Program Forensics
summary: A data reliability engineer tracing a failed overnight import must isolate a plausible but incorrect result from conflicting traces, repair its cause, and retain a regression witness for pagination, filtering, links, rate limits, versioning, and resumable work, producing resumable rate-aware API traversal. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a Python 3.14 urllib and HTTP client layers resumable rate-aware API traversal and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression rec…
objectives: Traverse offset, page-number, cursor, and link pagination while detecting repeats, gaps, and termination. Demonstrate the result through Python 3.14 urllib, http.client, ssl, typed protocols, and fixture transports.

Encode repeated parameters, arrays, dates, sorting, and filters according to the API contract without manual concatenation. Demonstrate the result through Python 3.14 urllib, http.client, ssl, typed protocols, and fixture transports.

Coordinate server guidance, local quotas, concurrency, backoff, and caller priorities without synchronized bursts. Demonstrate the result through Python 3.14 urllib, http.client, ssl, typed protocols, and fixture transports.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""http-clients-python cumulative safe data-client portfolio.

Browser labs use deterministic request and response models only. Live urllib,
DNS, TLS, sockets, concurrency, and load require local Python 3.14 transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RequestEvidence:
    method: str
    target: str
    attempt: int

@dataclass(frozen=True)
class ResponseEvidence:
    status: int
    body_bytes: int
    valid: bool

print("Python HTTP client portfolio ready")

steps.instruction:

Encode filters, detect loops, checkpoint stable identity, resume after failure, and avoid duplicates or gaps. Competency probe: Checkpoint traversal state, persist stable identities, resume after failure, and deduplicate without losing changed records. Demonstrate the result through Python 3.14 urllib, http.client, ssl, typed protocols, and fixture transports.
